channel.title: interviews - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Cicerone – Ray Daniels Interview, Ep. 187
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Have you ever wondered what it takes to become a Certified Cicerone? This week on Beer America TV we talk to the founder and Program Director, Ray Daniels, about what the test is all about, how difficult it is, and why it’s a certification worth getting if you work, or would like to work, in […]

The post Cicerone – Ray Daniels Interview, Ep. 187 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2013 Craft Brewers Conference, Ep. 186
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we come to you from Washington, D.C . and the 2013 Craft Brewers Conference! It was a record setting year looking back at 2012 and looking into the future for 2013. Nearly 1000 breweries were represented and nearly 7000 attendees participated in this years conference. Lot’s of cool stuff […]

The post 2013 Craft Brewers Conference, Ep. 186 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Not many brewers can say their family has been brewing in the US for over 150 years, but Fritz Rahr certainly can . The Beer America team of Paul Leone and John Pinkerton spent some time with Fritz and learned many things like their brewing history, why limited edition beers are limited edition, and that […]

The post An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Franconia Brewing – Cam Horn Interview, Ep. 137
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
While at the first ever North Texas Beer Festival. Beer America TV had the opportunity to meet local brewers and taste the what they had to offer. Dallas’s only brewery (for now) is the Franconia Brewing Company, which has only been in business for short time . In this episode we interview Cam Horn, their […]

The post Franconia Brewing – Cam Horn Interview, Ep. 137 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2011 North Texas Beer Festival, Ep. 136
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week we’re are at the first ever North Texas Beer Festival which was held at the Plano Center just outside of Dallas. Beer America TV had a booth and the opportunity to interview festival attendees and brewers, which we’ll be posting in the next few weeks . In the mean time, enjoy this conversation […]

The post 2011 North Texas Beer Festival, Ep. 136 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: A Candid Conversation with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver – Ep. 59
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We all know Garrett Oliver is the best dressed man in the brewing business, but he’s also the brewer of some pretty great beers as well . As Brewmaster of the Brooklyn Brewery, Garrett knows quite a bit about American Craft beer as well as food. We caught up with him at the Craft Brewers […]

The post A Candid Conversation with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver – Ep. 59 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Bob Cannon, Boston Brewery, Ep.57
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
You might not know his name, but if you’ve seen any commercials about Sam Adams, you’ve certainly seen his face . Bob Cannon is a brewer at the Boston Beer Company and has somewhat of a cult following in New England. He was nice enough to give Beer America TV a few minutes of his […]

The post Interview with Bob Cannon, Boston Brewery, Ep.57 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Jim Koch, Boston Beer Company – Ep. 56
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Our recent trip to the Craft Brewers Conference was a blast, and we had the opportunity to interview plenty of brewers. This week we start off with the owner of the largest American owned brewery, the one and only Jim Koch from the Boston Beer Company . He’s got plenty to say, and you’ll love […]

The post Interview with Jim Koch, Boston Beer Company – Ep. 56 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
